title: Africa
why_this_song: Africa by Toto (1982) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 8 times; first heard in: "I bless the rains down in Africa"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "I bless the rains down in Africa"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "I bless the rains down in Africa"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Hurry boy, it's waiting there for you"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Gonna take some time to do the things we never had"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I bless the rains down in Africa
Gonna take some time to do the things we never had
The wild dogs cry out in the night
As they grow restless longing for some solitary company
I bless the rains down in Africa
I passed some rains down in Africa (I bless the rains)
I bless the rains down in Africa
I passed some rains down in Africa (I bless)

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "rains" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "rains" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "bless" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "bless" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Hurry boy, it's waiting there for you
Frightened of this thing that I've become

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I hear the drums echoing tonight
I bless the rains down in Africa
I seek to cure what's deep inside

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Africa" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Africa" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Africa" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Africa", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Africa" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Africa" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
